# Perfect Pavers of Palm Beach

> Premium paver driveways, walkways, patios, pool decks, outdoor living, retaining and seating walls, natural stone, and paver cleaning & sealing across Palm Beach County, Florida. State Certified General Contractor (CGC#1524492), CMHA Certified Installer, 35+ years in South Florida.

Perfect Pavers of Palm Beach serves Palm Beach County homeowners, including West Palm Beach, Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, Wellington, Boca Raton, Delray Beach and Boynton Beach. We handle permits and HOA approvals and offer a free on-site visit with an itemized written estimate. Phone: (561) 834-8880.

## Services

- [Paver driveways](https://paversofpalmbeach.com/services/driveways/)
- [Walkways](https://paversofpalmbeach.com/services/walkways/)
- [Patios](https://paversofpalmbeach.com/services/patios/)
- [Pool decks](https://paversofpalmbeach.com/services/pool-decks/)
- [Outdoor living](https://paversofpalmbeach.com/services/outdoor-living/)
- [Retaining & seating walls](https://paversofpalmbeach.com/services/retaining-seating-walls/)
- [Natural stone](https://paversofpalmbeach.com/services/natural-stone/)
- [Clean & seal](https://paversofpalmbeach.com/services/clean-seal/)
